title: antennaria howellii var. campestris
intro: Antennaria howellii var. campestris, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which helps to soothe and heal wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Antennaria howellii var. campestris include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat minor skin issues and promote overall well-being.
